name: Contract type
description: This data element reports a code for the type of contract of the transaction.
optionalityRules: Required for Action types: NEWT, MODI, CORR, REVI
Optional for Action types: TERM, EROR, PRTO
valueRules: The allowable values are CFDS (contract for difference), FRAS (forward rate agreement), FORW (forward), OPTN (option), SWAP (swap), SWPT (swaption) and OTHR (other).

OTHR is reported only if the UPI reference data of the reported UPI code includes both a value for 'Return or Payout Trigger' (a FORW or SWAP attribute) and 'Valuation Method or Trigger' (an OPTN attribute).
If there is only one of those values in the UPI reference data of the reported UPI code, then Contract type would be, as applicable, FORW, SWAP, CFDS, FRAS, OPTN or SWPT.
